properties.description: Warm room with kitchen & toilets. Al ages welcome even dogs. Crafts available, jigsaws, board games etc Renew Meeting Place. Light lunches on Wednesdays. Hot drinks & snacks on Mondays and Fridays

properties.description: Dursley Library is accessible and located on May Lane. It is situated on the ground floor and has an accessible toilet. Libraries are traditionally a place where people can go without judgement or cost and we offer a range of core services all year round. What we are offering: •Warm, dry buildings spaces to sit and keep warm •Free access to Wi-Fi and free computer access with a Library membership •Places to charge your devices •Signposting to advice and support •Regular groups, activities and events ranging from jigsaw puzzles to social sessions Library membership is free! properties.description: Scarlet House care home in Stroud is a modern, purpose-built home that delivers round-the-clock residential and nursing care for older people.
